infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Black Book uses Face ID to protect your private network data, ensuring only you can access it.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Black Book needs microphone access to record voice memos. All data is stored locally on your device.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Black Book needs access to your contacts to import them. All data is stored locally on your device and will never be uploaded to any server.

plugins.contactsPermission: Black Book 需要访问通讯录来导入联系人，所有数据仅存储在本地，不会上传到任何服务器。

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Black Book to use Face ID for authentication.

plugins.microphonePermission: Black Book needs microphone permission to record voice memos.

plugins.contactsPermission: Black Book needs access to your contacts to import them. All data is stored locally and will never be uploaded to any server.
